content_html:
20th April 2026

TIL

SQL functions in Google Sheets to fetch data from Datasette— I've been experimenting with ways to fetch data from Datasette and display it in Google Sheets.

I put together some notes on patterns for fetching data from a Datasette instance directly into Google Sheets - using the 

importdata()
function, a "named function" that wraps it or a Google Apps Script if you need to send an API token in an HTTP header (not supported by 
importdata()
.)

Here's an example sheet demonstrating all three methods.
